title: thelypteris abrupta
intro: Thelypteris abrupta, also known as the abrupt fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The health benefits of Thelypteris abrupta include reducing inflammation, acting as an antiseptic, and possessing antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, often in combination with other herbs.
